title: Simple RPG Pack
description: Got tired of other RPG packs
body:
Conpletely remade rpg pack, meant to be basic while still having all the features you want in a rpg. Not many random weapons and armors, all serve a point and can change your playstyle.


Mod links:
[Vanilla Tweaks Website](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
[Falling Leaves](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/falling-leaves-forge)
[Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers)
[Grass flowers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-grass-flowers/gallery)
